description: Streamline your developer link blogging workflow. Fetch RSS feeds, auto-categorize posts by technology, and publish directly to WordPress—all from VS Code.
command.openWysiwygEditor: Dev Feed Curator: Open in WYSIWYG Editor
config.title: Dev Feed Curator
config.feedUrl.description: Single RSS feed URL to monitor
config.recordCount.description: Number of records to retrieve from RSS feed (appended as ?n=X parameter)
config.minimumDateTime.description: Minimum datetime for blog posts in UTC (ISO format, e.g., 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z or 2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z). Leave empty to automatically use the date of the latest 'Dew Drop' post from alvinashcraft.com, or fall back to last 24 hours (UTC) if unavailable. All date comparisons use UTC timezone.
config.enablePostFilteringBuffer.descrip: Enable buffer time when filtering posts by date to avoid edge cases where posts might be missed due to timing differences
config.postFilteringBufferMinutes.descri: Number of minutes to add as buffer when filtering posts (only applies when buffer is enabled)
config.enableAutoRefresh.description: Enable automatic refresh of RSS feed data. When disabled, refresh is manual only.
config.refreshInterval.description: Refresh interval in minutes (only applies when auto-refresh is enabled)
config.newsblurUsername.description: NewsBlur username for API access (enables fetching more than 25 items). Password is stored securely and will be prompted when needed.
config.useNewsblurApi.description: Use NewsBlur API instead of RSS feed (allows more than 25 items with authentication)
config.enableSubmissionApiSource.descrip: Enable approved-submissions API source to pull approved user-submitted links after the primary feed load
config.submissionApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the submissions API (for example, https://your-api-host.azurewebsites.net)
config.submissionApiLookbackDays.descrip: Number of days to look back when querying approved submissions (set to 0 to include all approved submissions)
config.wordpressUsername.description: WordPress username for publishing. Password is stored securely and will be prompted when needed.
config.wordpressCategories.description: Default WordPress categories to assign to published posts
config.openLinksInNewTab.description: Open blog post links in a new browser tab when clicked (adds target="_blank" to HTML exports)
config.enableDometrainSection.descriptio: Enable Dometrain Course section in exports (highlights a different video training course from Dometrain every day)
config.dometrainLastCourseId.description: Last Dometrain course ID shown (used for cycling through courses). Syncs across computers if VS Code settings sync is enabled.
config.openBlogAfterPublish.description: Automatically open the blog's base URL in the default browser after successfully publishing a post
